notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.likesDesc: Notifications when someone likes your posts

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.autoDesc: Theme will adapt to your system preferences

legal.title: Legal Conditions
legal.termsDescription: Review our terms of service to understand your rights and obligations.
legal.privacyDescription: Discover our privacy policy and how we protect your data.

welcome.title: Welcome to 42Hub!
welcome.message: Welcome {{name}}! Discover your new social network for the 42 community.

feed.title: Feed
feed.beFirstToPost: Be the first to post something!

terms.title: Terms of Service

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By creating an account and using this platform, you fully accept these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, you must not use this service.

account.title: 2. User Account
account.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and password. You accept full responsibility for all activities occurring under your account.
items: You guarantee that the information provided is accurate and complete
You must immediately inform us of any unauthorized access to your account
You agree not to share your account with other people

content.title: 3. User Content
content.content: You acknowledge that you are responsible for all content (messages, images, files) that you post or share on the platform. You accept that your content:
items: Does not violate any copyright or intellectual property rights
Is not illegal, defamatory, abusive or discriminatory
Does not contain malware or malicious code
Respects the rights and dignity of other users

behavior.title: 4. User Behavior
behavior.content: You commit to using the platform responsibly. The following behaviors are strictly prohibited:
items: Harassment or threats against other users
Spam, unsolicited advertising or repetitive content
Attempted hacking or unauthorized access
Identity spoofing or deception
Sexual, violent or shocking content

intellectual.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: The content, design and features of this platform are protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify or distribute this content without prior authorization.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: This platform is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We cannot be held responsible for:
items: Direct or indirect damages resulting from use of the service
Data loss or access loss
Third-party content or actions of other users

modifications.title: 7. Modification of Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will be effective immediately after publication. Your continued use of the service constitutes your acceptance of the modified terms.

applicable.title: 8. Applicable Law
applicable.content: These terms are governed by applicable laws. Any dispute arising from these terms will be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent court.

terms.contactEmail: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us at support@example.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: We place great importance on protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, share and protect your information when you use our platform.

data.title: 2. Data We Collect
items: Account Information: Username, email, password (encrypted)
Profile: First name, last name, bio, avatar
Created Content: Posts, comments, messages
Connection Data: IP address, device type, browser
Interactions: Likes, user tracking, notifications

usage.title: 3. Use of Your Data
items: Provide and improve platform services
Authenticate your account and secure your session
Personalize your user experience
Send notifications according to your preferences
Analyze service usage (anonymized data)
Comply with our legal obligations

sharing.title: 4. Sharing Your Data
sharing.content: We never sell your personal data. However, we may share your information:
items: With Other Users: Your public profile and posts are visible according to your privacy settings
With Service Providers: For hosting, payment services (if applicable)
Legal Compliance: If required by law or to protect our rights

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: We implement the following technical and organizational measures:
items: Password encryption with bcrypt
HTTPS connection to protect data in transit
Secure JWT token authentication
Restricted access to sensitive data
Role-based access controls

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the following rights regarding your data:
items: Access: You can view your personal data
Correction: You can modify your information in settings
Deletion: You can request deletion of your account
Portability: You can export your data
Opposition: You can refuse certain processing

cookies.title: 7. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
items: Store your authentication tokens
Remember your preferences (theme, language)
Improve your user experience
cookies.note: You can clear your localStorage at any time via your browser settings.

retention.title: 8. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your data as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, your data will be deleted within 30 days, unless the law requires us to retain it longer.

modifications.title: 9. Modifications to this Policy
modifications.content: We may update this privacy policy at any time. Changes will be published on this page with a new update date.

privacy.contactEmail: For any questions about this privacy policy or your data, please contact us at privacy@example.com
